name: vault-tools
description: Vault-specific skills, rules, and hooks for the MyVault Obsidian knowledge base. Provides note creation, search, inbox processing, maintenance, and frontmatter validation.

vault_path.title: Obsidian Vault Path
vault_path.description: Absolute path to your Obsidian vault (e.g., /home/user/Vaults/MyVault or C:\Users\user\Vaults\MyVault)
